name: miles-approval-handler
description: Handles Slack interactive button callbacks for the REQ approval gate. Receives the payload from the approve/reject buttons posted by miles-conversation-handler. Validates that the responder is an authorized approver (area head or universal approver, sourced from Notion DB f698c2da). Implements idempotency via a Notion lock table (DB 20437e6c) to prevent double-processing. On approve: updates the lock, reconstructs the Jira payload from the Slack thread, creates the REQ in Jira, posts confirmation to thread, and triggers canvas refresh. On reject: updates the lock and notifies the requester. Sends a reminder after 24 business hours via miles-reminder-handler.
